feat.name: Rising Blood Magic
feat.text: The power within your blood grows. You gain the basic spellcasting benefits. Each time you gain a spell slot of a new rank from the bloodrager archetype, add a common spell of the appropriate tradition and rank to your repertoire. In addition, when you Cast a Spell from your repertoire and you are at least drained 1, increase the extra damage dealt by that spell from Rage by 1.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
